description: Send 1000 compressed messages each of payload size 65536, auto-fragment to 256 octets. Use default permessage-deflate offer.
expectation: Receive echo'ed messages (with payload as sent). Timeout case after 480 secs.
httpRequest:
GET /runCase?case=369&agent=websock-client HTTP/1.1
Connection: Upgrade
Upgrade: websocket
Host: 127.0.0.1:9001
Sec-Websocket-Extensions: permessage-deflate; client_max_window_bits=15
Cache-Control: no-cache
Sec-Websocket-Version: 13
Sec-Websocket-Key: wXmI3UqwfW+nY8A9FkJOcg==
httpResponse:
HTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols
Server: AutobahnTestSuite/25.10.1-0.10.9
X-Powered-By: AutobahnPython/0.10.9
Upgrade: WebSocket
Connection: Upgrade
Sec-WebSocket-Accept: DaVioDQTwFDmpx4dvYc4TV4ZzOA=
Sec-WebSocket-Extensions: permessage-deflate
result: Case did not finish within 480 seconds.
resultClose: The connection was failed by the wrong endpoint
wasNotCleanReason: peer dropped the TCP connection without previous WebSocket closing handshake
